shadows.name: ambient-low
shadows.purpose: Lightbox default state, subtle container separation.

shadows.name: medium
shadows.purpose: Project card hover lift with translateY(-2px).

shadows.name: strong
shadows.purpose: Lightbox image shadow, teaser hover elevation.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default transition easing for state changes.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Terracotta CTA button for primary actions like 'GitHub Repository'.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #d9723a; color: #f5f0ec; padding: 12px 24px; border-radius: 4px; text-decoration: none; font-weight: 500; font-family: 'Figtree', -apple-system, sans-serif; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 0.2s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { opacity: 0.9; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #d9723a; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Tech Badge
components.description: Compact label for displaying technology names on project cards.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-block; background: #fdfcfb; color: #b5552a; padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; font-family: 'Figtree', -apple-system, sans-serif; margin: 0 0.5rem 1.5rem 1.5rem; }

components.name: Project Card
components.description: Two-column project card with image, title, description, and tech badges.
components.html:
Project Title

Description text here.

PythonFastAPI
components.css: .ds-card { background: #f5f0ec; border-radius: 8px; overflow: hidden; transition: transform 0.2s ease-out, box-shadow 0.2s ease-out; } .ds-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(30, 28, 26, 0.1); } .ds-card-link { color: inherit; text-decoration: none; display: block; } .ds-card-image { width: 100%; height: 200px; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 8px 8px 0 0; } .ds-card-image img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; transition: transform 0.3s ease-out; } .ds-card:hover .ds-card-image img { transform: scale(1.05); } .ds-card h3 { font-family: 'Manrope', -apple-system, sans-serif; margin: 1.25rem 1.5rem 0.5rem; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 700; text-align: left; } .ds-card p { color: #5a534f; margin: 0 1.5rem 1rem; line-height: 1.6; text-align: left; }

components.name: Form Input
components.description: Text input and textarea for the contact form.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; padding: 12px; border: 1px solid #e8e2dc; border-radius: 4px; font-family: 'Figtree', -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; background: #fdfcfb; color: #1e1c1a; transition: border-color 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s; } .ds-input:focus-visible { border-color: #d9723a; outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(217, 114, 58, 0.3); } .ds-label { display: block; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; font-weight: 500; font-family: 'Figtree', -apple-system, sans-serif; } .ds-input:invalid:not(:placeholder-shown) { border-color: #b53a3a; }

components.name: Navigation
components.description: Sticky header with logo, nav links, social icons, and mobile hamburger toggle.
components.html:
Gonzalo Gamez
  • About
  • Projects
components.css: .ds-nav { position: sticky; top: 0; background: #fdfcfb; border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e2dc; z-index: 100; } .ds-nav { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; height: 60px; max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 clamp(1rem, 4vw, 1.5rem); gap: 1rem; } .ds-logo { font-family: 'Manrope', -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 700; color: #1e1c1a; text-decoration: none; } .ds-nav-menu { display: flex; list-style: none; gap: 2rem; } .ds-nav-link { color: #5a534f; text-decoration: none; font-weight: 500; font-family: 'Figtree', -apple-system, sans-serif; transition: color 0.2s; } .ds-nav-link:hover, .ds-nav-link.active { color: #b5552a; } .ds-nav-link:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #d9723a; outline-offset: 4px; border-radius: 2px; } .ds-nav-toggle { display: none; flex-direction: column; gap: 5px; background: none; border: none; cursor: pointer; padding: 10px; min-width: 44px; min-height: 44px; align-items: center; justify-content: center; } .ds-nav-toggle span { width: 25px; height: 3px; background-color: #1e1c1a; transition: transform 0.3s ease, opacity 0.3s ease; } @media (max-width: 768px) { .ds-nav-toggle { display: flex; } .ds-nav-menu { display: none; } .ds-nav-menu.active { display: flex; flex-direction: column; padding: 1rem; border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e2dc; position: absolute; top: 100%; left: 0; right: 0; background: #fdfcfb; } }

components.name: Timeline Entry
components.description: Career timeline item with avatar/icon, title, location, and date.
components.html:
Role Title

Subtitle or description

Location · Dates
components.css: .ds-timeline { position: relative; padding-left: 3rem; max-width: 800px; margin: 0 auto; } .ds-timeline::before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 0; top: 40px; bottom: 40px; width: 2px; background-color: #e8e2dc; } .ds-timeline-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 1.5rem; margin-bottom: 2.5rem; position: relative; } .ds-timeline-avatar img { width: 70px; height: 70px; border-radius: 50%; object-fit: cover; background-color: #f5f0ec; border: 2px solid #d9723a; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(30, 28, 26, 0.08); transition: transform 0.35s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1), filter 0.35s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1), box-shadow 0.35s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1); } .ds-timeline-item:hover .ds-timeline-avatar img { transform: translateY(-4px) scale(1.12); box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(30, 28, 26, 0.22); } .ds-timeline-content { flex: 1; padding-top: 0.5rem; transition: transform 0.35s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1); } .ds-timeline-item:hover .ds-timeline-content { transform: translateX(-4px); } .ds-timeline-content h3 { font-family: 'Manrope', -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 700; margin: 0 0 0.25rem; line-height: 1.3; color: #1e1c1a; } .ds-timeline-sub { color: #5a534f; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-style: italic; margin: 0 0 0.25rem; } .ds-timeline-loc { color: #5a534f; font-size: 0.9375rem; margin: 0 0 0.25rem; } @media (max-width: 768px) { .ds-timeline { padding-left: 2.5rem; } .ds-timeline::before { display: none; } .ds-timeline-item { flex-direction: column; align-items: center; text-align: center; } }

narrative.overview: This is a portfolio built like engineering documentation: clean, precise, no decoration without purpose. The visual language mirrors the work — AI systems that are transparent, explainable, and well-structured. Warm tones (terracotta accent on an off-white canvas) keep it human; the layout discipline keeps it sharp. Every section presents evidence: project artifacts, tech stacks, career timeline, data visualizations. Nothing exists to fill space.
keyCharacteristics: Warm neutral canvas with a single committed accent (terracotta)
Two-family typography: Manrope for headings (structural), Figtree for body (readable)
Tonal layering over heavy shadows — surfaces distinguished by subtle background shifts
Asymmetric layouts where content demands it; left-aligned, not center-stacked
Evidence-first: data visualizations, real project images, concrete tech badges

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: The terracotta accent (#d9723a) appears on ≤10% of any given screen. Its scarcity is what makes it effective.

rules.name: The Weight Gap Rule
rules.body: Heading weights start at 700 and go up to 800 — no 500 or 600 in headings. This creates a hard step from body (400) to the smallest heading (700), a ≥1.75 weight ratio that makes hierarchy unambiguous even without size contrast.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows appear only as a response to state (hover, focus, active). A card that shadows without user interaction is guessing at importance — let content hierarchy decide what matters.

dos: Do use terracotta (#d9723a) sparingly — on interactive elements, data visualization accents, and structural borders.
Do let content determine layout direction. Left-aligned sections with asymmetric compositions feel more designed than centered stacks.
Do maintain the weight gap: body at 400, all headings at 700+.
Do use tonal layering as the primary depth strategy.
Do keep animations purposeful: ease-out-quart or ease-out-expo curves.
Do use real project imagery — data visualizations, screenshots, photos of work artifacts.
donts: Don't use dark mode as a default or aesthetic crutch.
Don't reach for SaaS-cream patterns: gradient hero metrics, blue-on-white corporate templates, identical card grids.
Don't use side-stripe borders (border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent).
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with gradient).
Don't use glassmorphism (blurs, frosted glass) as a default treatment.
Don't nest cards inside other cards.
Don't add decorative elements that don't serve information, navigation, or interaction.
